name: Cenntro Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We are an emerging designer, manufacturer, distributor, and service provider of commercial vehicles powered by either electricity or hydrogen energy sources. Our commercial vehicles are designed to serve a variety of fleet and municipal organizations in support of city services, last-mile delivery and other commercial applications. As of December 31, 2024, we have developed six series of commercial vehicle models, Metro, Logistar, Logimax, Avantier, Teemak and Antric One. We have...
